description_long: This object consists of a large, curved archway with a lattice pattern, flanked by four rectangular lattice panels arranged symmetrically on either side. The arch is supported by slender legs and features a decorative, semi-circular top with a grid design. The rectangular panels are also supported by thin legs and have a matching lattice pattern, giving the entire structure a cohesive, ornamental appearance. The construction appears to be metallic, with a uniform light beige or tan finish. The open latticework allows visibility and airflow, while the overall form suggests a decorative or ceremonial function, such as marking an entrance or serving as a backdrop. The design is elegant and functional, suitable for outdoor urban environments like parks, plazas, or event spaces.
description: A decorative curved archway with matching lattice panels, all supported by slender legs and finished in a light beige metallic color. The structure is open and ornamental, ideal for marking entrances or serving as a backdrop in urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full archway and all four lattice panels arranged symmetrically, highlighting the decorative grid pattern.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth and curvature of the arch, with the thin profile of the lattice panels visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the arrangement of the arch and panels, clearly showing the spatial relationship and symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, again showing the arch's curve and the thinness of the panels.
